title: CLAUDE.md: move project structure tree to docs/
description: The project structure tree (40+ lines) is reference material consuming tokens every conversation. Move it to docs/project-structure.md or references/ and replace with a one-line reference. Based on the Anthropic skills guide progressive disclosure principle: keep always-loaded content focused on critical instructions.

title: Phase 4: Add Deterministic Scripts
description: Create scripts for deterministic validations: validate-blueprint.sh (required sections check), validate-pr-doc.sh (PR doc structure), check-progress.sh (count [x] vs [ ] as JSON), parse-asana-url.sh (extract task ID from URL formats). Place in .claude/scripts/ or scripts/. Update skills to call these scripts.

title: Phase 6: Add Examples to Skills
description: Add 1-2 usage examples per skill showing: what the user says, and what the result looks like. Format: ## Examples with ### Example N: title, user input, and expected output.

title: CLAUDE.md: reference validation scripts
description: CLAUDE.md doesn't mention the .claude/scripts/ directory or the deterministic validation scripts. Add a short note in the Conventions section (or a new Tools section) referencing the 4 scripts (validate-blueprint.sh, validate-pr-doc.sh, check-progress.sh, parse-asana-url.sh) so Claude knows they exist for validation. Based on the Anthropic skills guide: code is deterministic, language interpretation isn't.

title: Update docs/roles.md DEV skills table
description: The DEV skills table (line 79-92) only lists 12 skills. Missing the 5 PO/DESIGN skills that DEV also has access to: /draft, /refine-ticket, /review-ticket, /design, /review-design. These should be added under a separate group (e.g., 'Ticket Management' or 'PO/DESIGN Skills') to distinguish them from the core DEV flow.

title: Phase 2: Extract References and Templates
description: Extract inline content (code style rules, review checklists, PR conventions, emoji mappings, contract template definitions, quality gates, design validation checks) into references/ files. Update skills to reference them instead. Reduces token waste and eliminates duplication across skills.

title: Phase 5: Eliminate Duplication Across Skills
description: Deduplicate shared logic: Asana URL parsing (8 skills), PR title prefix mapping (3 skills), PR body emoji mappings (2 skills), review checklist categories (2 skills), progress counting logic (2 skills), Docker vs local detection. Mostly covered by Phases 2 and 4 — this task tracks verification that duplication is fully resolved.

title: Update CLAUDE.md project structure and skills list
description: CLAUDE.md is missing new structure from Phases 2-4 of the skills upgrade. Needs: (1) Add .claude/references/ (5 files) and .claude/scripts/ (4 scripts) to the project structure tree. (2) Add 5 missing skills to the commands list (draft, refine-ticket, review-ticket, design, review-design). (3) Add references/ and scripts/ entries under .claude/ in the tree.

title: CLAUDE.md: add explicit Do NOT constraints
description: Add negative instructions section listing what Claude must never do in this project: (1) Never auto-commit — always wait for user, (2) Never write to repo when acting as PO or DESIGN role, (3) Never skip /review-code before /wrap-up, (4) Never modify Asana-owned blueprint sections during /implement. Based on the Anthropic skills guide negative triggers pattern.

title: Phase 7: Convert to Portable Skill Format (Future)
description: Convert .claude/commands/ to portable skill folder format (skills/{name}/SKILL.md with scripts/ and references/ subfolders). Deferred — only needed when distributing skills to other teams or using in Claude.ai/API. Estimated 8-10h.

title: Replace dashboard/README.md with project-specific docs
description: dashboard/README.md is still the default Vite boilerplate. Should be replaced with actual dashboard documentation: what it does, how to run it, how to configure repos, tech stack (Vite + React + TypeScript + shadcn/ui). Low priority — cosmetic improvement.

title: Phase 3: Add Troubleshooting Sections
description: Add troubleshooting sections to all skills documenting common failures (Asana URL invalid, MCP unavailable, blueprint not found, gh CLI not authenticated, etc). Format: ## Troubleshooting with ### per failure, each with Cause and Solution.

title: Phase 1: Add YAML Frontmatter to All Skills
description: Add YAML frontmatter (name + description with trigger phrases) to all 17 skills in .claude/commands/. This enables auto-triggering and progressive disclosure. See ~/Desktop/bbox-next-steps/skills-upgrade-action-plan.md for the full mapping of skill names and descriptions.

title: CLAUDE.md: add Critical Rules section at the top
description: Critical rules are buried at the bottom (Co-Authored-By at line 108, ASANA_TOKEN at line 112). Add a Critical Rules section near the top of CLAUDE.md consolidating: (1) Never add Co-Authored-By, (2) Never auto-commit, (3) ASANA_TOKEN required for Asana skills, (4) Commit format [DEV] {type}/{name}: summary. Based on the Anthropic skills guide: put critical instructions at the top.
